title: usecase.Done (status=done, completed_at=now)
acceptance_criteria: Usecase sets Item.Status = done, Item.CompletedAt = clock.Now(), Item.UpdatedAt = clock.Now(), Item.Version = old.Version + 1 before calling Store.Put. The store never touches time or version.
Optional --note appends a journal entry with event=completed (entry timestamp also from the injected clock).
Lease enforcement deferred to Phase 3; Phase 1 ignores --lease-id.
